title: Better than the original:TENEX
description: This is a lightweight mod pack primarily focused on subtly enhancing the vanilla experience.
body:
# Better than the original:TENEX

### (touhou and Cartoon style minecraft base pack)

This is a lightweight modpack primarily focused on subtly enhancing the vanilla experience.

It includes common mods aimed at optimizing game performance and adds a few relaxing and enjoyable mods. The pack is ideal for players who appreciate the vanilla style but want a bit of extra challenge without needing to invest significant time in mastering complex mechanics. There are no complicated tech or magic systems, and combat remains close to the vanilla feel.

The modpack also features a custom resource pack BTTO for personalization. If you don’t like it, you can remove it, but using the Whimscape resource pack is highly recommended.

And two touhou texture pack(May be placed in BTTO)  
[Touhou Suwako Moriya Totem](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/touhou-suwako-moriya-totem/)  
[Touhou Flandre Scarlet Allay](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/touhou-flandre-scarlet-allay/)

BTTO Resourcepack  
This Resourcepack includes some personally tweaked texture maps and parts of other texture packs.  
([Faithless](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/faithless) [Conquest](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/conquest-reforged-resource-pack))

FAQ

A: Tested and supported for LAN and server play.  
B: You can use it to create your own modpack. If you feel it’s necessary, you can mention BTTO modpack in your description to indicate the source of the pack.  
C：For the best display, it's recommended that your PC has a performance close to "CPU i7-12700f, GPU-3060Ti".  
  
Feedback & bug reports: [eirlocn@yeah.net](mailto:eirlocn@yeah.net)  
_TR:ChatGPT cn to en_
